title: sterculia spangleri
intro: Sterculia spangleri is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the sterculia tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Sterculia spangleri include the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential role in reducing blood sugar levels and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark, leaves, and roots are often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
